description: Routing discrimination suite for the hybrid-posture skill descriptions. Each case presents an unlabeled user message; the router must pick the correct skill (or none) from standing descriptions alone. Used as the A/B gate when tightening hybrid descriptions: a description change is acceptable only if no case that passed on the baseline fails on the candidate.

cases.name: Plain PR inspection request routes to the single-perspective reviewer
cases.prompt: Go over PR #212 for bugs, breaking changes, and test gaps.
cases.rationale: A concrete artifact plus defect-finding intent is the core positive signal; it must not escalate to the multi-perspective pack without a risk/parallel ask.

cases.name: Chinese diff-check request routes to the reviewer
cases.prompt: 帮我看看这个 diff 有没有 bug，顺带查一下安全隐患。
cases.rationale: Bilingual users phrase artifact-scoped checks in Chinese; the description must still catch diff + defect vocabulary.

cases.name: High-risk parallel-perspective ask routes to the multi-reviewer pack
cases.prompt: This auth refactor PR is high risk — split it across parallel checkers for correctness, security, and invariant compatibility.
cases.rationale: Explicit multi-perspective, high-risk vocabulary is what separates the pack from the ordinary reviewer.

cases.name: Multi-perspective OpenSpec change inspection routes to the pack
cases.prompt: Before merge, run this OpenSpec change past several independent perspectives — spec compliance, integration, and test evidence.
cases.rationale: OpenSpec artifacts with a multi-perspective ask belong to the pack, not the single reviewer or a consistency-only pass.

cases.name: Contradictory implementation request routes to disambiguation
cases.prompt: The ticket says to support both SSO and passwordless login but also says no third-party auth — pin down what we are actually building before we start.
cases.rationale: A direct contradiction inside an implementation request is the strongest auto-trigger signal for disambiguation.

cases.name: Missing acceptance criteria before build routes to disambiguation
cases.prompt: Spec this change properly before we build it: the acceptance criteria are missing and the request contradicts itself about caching behavior.
cases.rationale: Missing acceptance criteria that would change the build is an explicit boundary condition in the description.

cases.name: Chosen direction to requirements document routes to the PRD author
cases.prompt: We picked the notification-preferences direction; write the requirements document with acceptance criteria and success metrics.
cases.rationale: A chosen direction plus a requirements-document ask is the positive gate; ideation and planning must not steal it.

cases.name: Chinese PRD request routes to the PRD author
cases.prompt: 把我们定下来的搜索改版方向写成 PRD。
cases.rationale: The Chinese trigger vocabulary must survive description tightening.

cases.name: Research pack installation routes to profile bootstrap
cases.prompt: We just installed the research-engineering pack in the hydrology repo — set up the standing project research profile.
cases.rationale: Install-time profile setup is the primary positive case for the bootstrap skill.

cases.name: New recurring scientific surface routes to profile bootstrap
cases.prompt: This repo keeps running snow simulations now; scan the codebase and create the durable research profile for it.
cases.rationale: A repository gaining a recurring scientific surface is the second positive condition named by the description.

cases.name: Scientific uncertainty before any study routes to question framing
cases.prompt: We suspect the melt bias comes from the temperature-index scheme; turn this into a bounded research contract before anyone designs a study.
cases.rationale: Pre-study framing of a scientific uncertainty is the core positive; study design must wait for an approved contract.

cases.name: Unbounded uncertainty routes to question framing, not study design
cases.prompt: Frame the sediment-transport uncertainty into explicit claims, alternatives, and evidence needs — we are not ready to design the experiment yet.
cases.rationale: Claims/alternatives/evidence-needs vocabulary belongs to framing; the profile bootstrap and study design are adjacent thieves.

cases.name: Open direction question routes to ideation
cases.prompt: Should we build the importer as a plugin or as a separate service? I am genuinely unsure which direction fits us.
cases.rationale: Direction is not chosen, so the PRD author, disambiguation, and execution planning must all stay quiet.

cases.name: Vague product idea routes to ideation
cases.prompt: I have a fuzzy idea about improving onboarding — help me explore the option space first.
cases.rationale: Explicit option-space exploration with no chosen direction is the ideation skill's home turf.

cases.name: Fixed direction with rollout concerns routes to deep execution planning
cases.prompt: Direction is fixed: migrate auth to the new gateway. Draft the phased execution plan with rollback, dependency order, and verification.
cases.rationale: Phases, rollback, and dependency ordering after a chosen direction are the planning skill's positive signals.

cases.name: Chinese deep-plan request routes to execution planning
cases.prompt: 这个跨模块重构方向已经定了，给我一份带依赖顺序和回滚路径的深度实施计划。
cases.rationale: Chinese execution-planning vocabulary must keep routing correctly.

cases.name: Citation-backed landscape question routes to the research pipeline
cases.prompt: Compare the current LLM eval frameworks with fresh citations — what actually changed in the past year?
cases.rationale: Fresh, sourced external comparison is the research pipeline's positive case, not framing or ideation.

cases.name: Sourced market overview routes to the research pipeline
cases.prompt: Give me a sourced market overview of vector databases with a date on every claim.
cases.rationale: Cited market research is external research work, not business-model authoring.

cases.name: Consistency-only PR check routes to the entropy pass
cases.prompt: Check this PR only for naming drift and pattern duplication against our existing conventions.
cases.rationale: Consistency-only scope excludes the correctness reviewer; the drift vocabulary belongs to the entropy pass.

cases.name: Error-model consistency check routes to the entropy pass
cases.prompt: Does this diff stay consistent with our error-handling model? Not asking for a full correctness pass.
cases.rationale: An explicit not-correctness qualifier must keep both reviewer skills out.

cases.name: Approved research contract routes to study design
cases.prompt: The research contract is approved; design the study protocol with verification thresholds and falsifiable checks.
cases.rationale: An approved contract is the hand-off point where framing ends and protocol design begins.

cases.name: Falsifiable experiment design routes to study design
cases.prompt: Turn the approved snow-scheme question into a falsifiable experimental design with explicit thresholds.
cases.rationale: Experimental-design vocabulary after approval belongs to protocol design, not another framing round.

cases.name: Chosen business direction routes to the business strategist
cases.prompt: Draft the full business case for our chosen SaaS pricing pivot — market sizing, unit economics, and go-to-market.
cases.rationale: Business-model deliverables for a chosen direction belong to the business strategist, not the product-requirements author or the research pipeline.

cases.name: Chinese business-plan request routes to the business strategist
cases.prompt: 把这个已经定下来的副业方向写成一份商业计划，包含收入模型和风险评估。
cases.rationale: Chinese business-plan vocabulary must route to business strategy, not product requirements.

cases.name: Plain mechanical execution routes nowhere
cases.prompt: Rename the utils folder to lib and fix the imports.
cases.rationale: Specific, unambiguous execution needs no skill; disambiguation and planning must not add ceremony.

cases.name: Plain knowledge question routes nowhere
cases.prompt: What is the difference between git rebase and git merge?
cases.rationale: A one-off factual answer needs neither the research pipeline nor ideation.

cases.name: Trivial edit routes nowhere
cases.prompt: Fix this typo in the README, it says 'recieve'.
cases.rationale: A trivial edit must not wake the reviewer.
